ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "starttime" TEXT /* Start time of the trip */,
  "stoptime" TEXT /* Stop time of the trip */,
  "start_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the start station */,
  "end_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the end station */,
  "bikeid" INTEGER /* ID of the bike used */,
  "usertype" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., Subscriber, Customer) */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year of birth of the user */,
  "gender" INTEGER /* Gender of the user (0 = Unknown, 1 = Male, 2 = Female) */,
  "trip_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trip in minutes */,
  "start_station_name" TEXT /* Name of the start station */,
  "end_station_name" TEXT /* Name of the end station */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the route taken */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the trip */,
  "trip_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_end_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_start_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_bikeid FOREIGN KEY ("bikeid") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the station */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the station */,
  "current_bikes" INTEGER /* Number of bikes currently available at the station */,
  "last_update_time" TEXT /* Last time the station data was updated */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of station */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bikes" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "bike_model" TEXT /* Model of the bike */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance check */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bike */,
  "battery_level" INTEGER /* Battery level of the bike (for electric bikes) */,
  "maintenanceDue" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "last_location_latitude" REAL /* Last known latitude of the bike */,
  "last_location_longitude" REAL /* Last known longitude of the bike */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "usertype" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., Subscriber, Customer) */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year of birth of the user */,
  "gender" INTEGER /* Gender of the user (0 = Unknown, 1 = Male, 2 = Female) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "subscription_plan" TEXT /* Type of subscription plan */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the service */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_bike_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike */,
  "access_start_date" TEXT /* Date the user's access to the bike started */,
  "access_end_date" TEXT /* Date the user's access to the bike ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the access */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_bike_access_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_bike_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
